name: Strawberry Cream Cheese Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Crepes: Beat the eggs slightly; add the remaining ingredients and beat just until smooth. Pour a few tablespoons into a hot skillet, tilting to spread evenly. Brown lightly on both sides.
2. Topping: Stir together sugar and berries in a medium saucepan; bring to a full boil. Reduce heat and cook for 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Filling: Blend the powdered sugar and cream cheese until smooth. Fold in the berries. Pour about 2 tablespoons onto each crepe, roll up. Serve topped with warm strawberry sauce. Makes 10 to 12 crepes.
